message:
test(pt-core): extend app supervision coverage for PM2/supervisord/nodemon/forever (process_triage-8z2)

Add 44 inline unit tests covering detection logic, action generation,
configuration toggles, serialization roundtrips, and priority ordering
for all four supervised-process analyzers. Total: 51 tests (was 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
